qualification.education_qualification: B Tech Degree from a reputed institute or MBA with technical background
qualification.details: Assistant Manager: B Tech Degree from a reputed institute or MBA with technical background. Minimum of 1-2 years experience in incubation, startup/MSME/entrepreneurial ecosystem. Knowledge of Industry 4.0, Technology & Business solutions.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIML EIC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Assistant Manager position at IIML EIC is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Manager role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech Degree from a reputed institute or an MBA with a technical background to be eligible for the Assistant Manager position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Assistant Manager role will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 3.60 Lacs to Rs. 5.40 Lacs Per Annum.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Manager post in the IIM Lucknow Enterprise Incubation Centre.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Assistant Manager recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Assistant Manager post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by multiple rounds of interviews.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Assistant Manager position is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum experience required for the Assistant Manager role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 1-2 years of experience in incubation, startup/MSME/entrepreneurial ecosystem is required for the Assistant Manager position.

faq.question: Q10. What specific knowledge is preferred for the Assistant Manager role?
faq.answer: Candidates are expected to have knowledge of Industry 4.0, Technology & Business solutions for the Assistant Manager role.
